response.justification: Maria Rodriguez is a skilled full-stack engineer with 15+ years of broad technical experience and genuine staff-level seniority, but she does not satisfy the core requirements of this GenAI-focused role. The position demands 8+ years building AI-driven solutions; her only visible AI/agentic work is in her current role at re:cinq (started April 2025), where she contributes to MCP code generators and agentic workflow tooling — roughly one year of exposure. Python, which is the dominant language for GenAI development and explicitly required, does not appear anywhere in her skills or employment history. Furthermore, there is no evidence of vector database experience, RAG architecture design, LLM evaluation pipelines, or customer-facing technical leadership of the kind expected at staff level in a forward-deployed consulting context.
strengths: Solid TypeScript and Node.js expertise demonstrated across multiple production environments at scale, matching one of the role's primary languages
Direct hands-on experience with Model Context Protocol (MCP) server development and agentic workflow infrastructure at re:cinq, which maps to a key technology listed in the job description
Established staff-level seniority with evidence of mentoring, public knowledge-sharing (workshops, conference talks), and open-source technical leadership
concerns: Python is entirely absent from her listed skills and all employment history, despite being the primary language for GenAI engineering and a hard requirement for this role
No evidence of vector databases, RAG architectures, or LLM performance evaluation and optimization — the foundational GenAI competencies this staff role is built around
The required 8+ years of AI-driven solution development is not met; her AI and agentic work is limited to approximately one year in her current position

key_factors.factor: MCP server and agentic workflow experience
